description: A short mercantile letter to Avraham b. Ṣāliḥ b. Zarqī (?), probably from his father. The writer rebukes the recipient for failing to send him flax in time, thereby causing his enemies to gloat. He mentions Khallūf and Fā'iza who seem to be family members, and Sahlān and ʿImrān and Farjūn who seem to be other merchants. Also mentions the city of Mazar [in Sicily]. Probably 11th century. Parchment. ASE/MR
